---
title: "11_disease_trajectory"
format: html
editor: source
---

```{r}
install_if_missing_cran <- function(pkg) {
  if (!requireNamespace(pkg, quietly = TRUE)) {
    install.packages(
      pkg,
      lib = ("/mmfs1/gscratch/togo/leidholt/R_SLL_Seurat/"),
      dependencies = TRUE
    )
  }
}

install_if_missing_bioc <- function(pkg) {
  if (!requireNamespace(pkg, quietly = TRUE)) {
    BiocManager::install(
      pkg,
      lib = ("/mmfs1/gscratch/togo/leidholt/R_SLL_Seurat/"),
      update = FALSE,
      ask = FALSE
    )
  }
}

library(Seurat)
library(dplyr)
library(harmony)
library(aws.s3)
library(jsonlite)
library(patchwork)
```

```{r}
#directores
user <- Sys.info()[["user"]]

if (user == "leidholt") {
  root_path <- c("/mmfs1/gscratch/togo/leidholt/") #hyak
  git_path <- "/mmfs1/gscratch/togo/leidholt/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad"
  keys <- fromJSON("/mmfs1/home/leidholt/keys.json")
} else if (user == "sleidholt") {
    root_path <- c("/Users/Shared/OneDrive - UW/Laura Pyle's files - Biostatistics Core Shared Drive/") #mac studio
    dir.results <- c("/Users/Shared/OneDrive - UW/Laura Pyle's files - Biostatistics Core Shared Drive/Savanah Leidholt/") 
    git_path <- "/Users/sleidholt/Documents/GitHub/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad/Savanah Leidholt"
} else if (user == "savanahleidholt") {
    root_path <- c("/Users/savanahleidholt/OneDrive - UW/Laura Pyle's files - Biostatistics Core Shared Drive/") #laptop
    dir.results <- c("/Users/savanahleidholt/OneDrive - UW/Laura Pyle's files - Biostatistics Core Shared Drive/Savanah Leidholt/") 
    git_path <- "/Users/savanahleidholt/Desktop/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad/Savanah Leidholt"
} else {
  stop("Unknown user: please specify root path for this user.")
}
```

```{r}
Sys.setenv(
  "AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID" = keys$MY_ACCESS_KEY,
  "AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY" = keys$MY_SECRET_KEY,
  "AWS_DEFAULT_REGION" = "",
  "AWS_REGION" = "",
  "AWS_S3_ENDPOINT" = "s3.kopah.uw.edu"
)
```

```{r}
pb90_PT <- s3readRDS(
  object = "data/disease trajectory/pb90_multiomics_PT_20260529.rds",
  bucket = "triad",
  region = ""
)

pb90_TAL <- s3readRDS(
  object = "data/disease trajectory/pb90_multiomics_TAL_20260529.rds",
  bucket = "triad",
  region = ""
)

pb90_EC_PTC <- s3readRDS(
  object = "data/disease trajectory/pb90_multiomics_EC_PTC_20260529.rds",
  bucket = "triad",
  region = ""
)

pb90_EC_all <- s3readRDS(
  object = "data/disease trajectory/pb90_multiomics_EC_all_20260529.rds",
  bucket = "triad",
  region = ""
)
```

```{r fig.width=18}
p1 <-  DimPlot(
  pb90_PT,
  reduction = "umap.TRIAD",
  group.by = "group"
)

p2 <-DimPlot(
  pb90_PT,
  reduction = "umap.TRIAD",
  group.by = "KPMP_celltype"
)

p3 <- DimPlot(
  pb90_PT,
  reduction = "umap.TRIAD",
  split.by = "group",
  group.by = "KPMP_celltype",
  ncol = 2
)

p1 | p2

p3 | p2
```

```{r fig.width=20, fig.height=10}
p4 <- FeaturePlot(
  pb90_PT,
  reduction = "umap.TRIAD",
  features = c(
    "HAVCR1",
    "VCAM1",
    "LCN2",
    "KRT8",
    "KRT18",
    "VIM"
  )
)

p2 + p4

p3 | p4
```

```{r}
score_and_summarize <- function(obj, gene_set, score_name, group_var = "group") {
  
  genes_use <- intersect(gene_set, rownames(obj))
  
  message(score_name, ": using ", length(genes_use), " genes")
  print(genes_use)
  
  obj <- AddModuleScore(
    obj,
    features = list(genes_use),
    name = score_name
  )
  
  score_col <- paste0(score_name, "1")
  
  cell_df <- FetchData(
    obj,
    vars = c(score_col, group_var, "record_id", "KPMP_celltype")
  )
  
  donor_df <- cell_df %>%
    group_by(record_id, .data[[group_var]]) %>%
    summarise(
      mean_score = mean(.data[[score_col]], na.rm = TRUE),
      median_score = median(.data[[score_col]], na.rm = TRUE),
      n_cells = n(),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  
  list(
    obj = obj,
    cell_df = cell_df,
    donor_df = donor_df,
    score_col = score_col
  )
}
```

```{r}
#PT disease trajectory score
pt_injury_genes <- c(
  "HAVCR1", "VCAM1", "LCN2", "KRT8", "KRT18", "VIM", "SOX9"
)

pt_identity_genes <- c(
  "LRP2", "CUBN", "SLC5A2", "SLC34A1", "ALDOB", "AQP1"
)

pt_injury <- score_and_summarize(
  obj = pb90_PT,
  gene_set = pt_injury_genes,
  score_name = "PT_injury"
)

pb90_PT <- pt_injury$obj

pt_identity <- score_and_summarize(
  obj = pb90_PT,
  gene_set = pt_identity_genes,
  score_name = "PT_identity"
)

pb90_PT <- pt_identity$obj
VlnPlot(
  pb90_PT,
  features = c("PT_injury1", "PT_identity1"),
  group.by = "group",
  pt.size = 0
)

FeaturePlot(
  pb90_PT,
  reduction = "umap.TRIAD",
  features = c("PT_injury1", "PT_identity1"),
  ncol = 2
)
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
#Donor-level plot
pt_donor <- FetchData(
  pb90_PT,
  vars = c("PT_injury1", "PT_identity1", "group", "record_id")
) %>%
  group_by(record_id, group) %>%
  summarise(
    PT_injury = mean(PT_injury1, na.rm = TRUE),
    PT_identity = mean(PT_identity1, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_cells = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ggplot(pt_donor, aes(x = group, y = PT_injury)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, size = 2) +
  theme_classic()

ggplot(pt_donor, aes(x = PT_identity, y = PT_injury, label = record_id)) +
  geom_point(aes(size = n_cells)) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(
    x = "PT identity score",
    y = "PT injury score"
  )
```

```{r}
library(slingshot)
library(SingleCellExperiment)

run_slingshot_from_seurat <- function(obj, reduction = "umap.TRIAD", cluster_col = "KPMP_celltype") {
  
  sce <- as.SingleCellExperiment(obj)
  
  reducedDims(sce)$UMAP_TRIAD <- Embeddings(obj, reduction = reduction)
  colData(sce)$cluster <- obj[[cluster_col]][, 1]
  colData(sce)$group <- obj$group
  colData(sce)$record_id <- obj$record_id
  
  sce <- slingshot(
    sce,
    clusterLabels = "cluster",
    reducedDim = "UMAP_TRIAD"
  )
  
  obj$pseudotime <- slingPseudotime(sce)[, 1]
  
  list(obj = obj, sce = sce)
}
```

```{r}
pt_sling <- run_slingshot_from_seurat(pb90_PT)
pb90_PT <- pt_sling$obj

p1 <- FeaturePlot(
  pb90_PT,
  reduction = "umap.TRIAD",
  features = "pseudotime"
)

p2 <- DimPlot(
  pb90_PT,
  reduction = "umap.TRIAD",
  group.by = "KPMP_celltype",
  label = TRUE,
  repel = TRUE
)

p1 | p2

VlnPlot(
  pb90_PT,
  features = "pseudotime",
  group.by = "group",
  pt.size = 0
)


```

```{r}
pb90_PT <- AddModuleScore(
  pb90_PT,
  features = list(
    c(
      "HAVCR1",
      "VCAM1",
      "LCN2",
      "KRT8",
      "KRT18",
      "VIM"
    )
  ),
  name = "Injury"
)

pb90_PT <- AddModuleScore(
  pb90_PT,
  features = list(
    c(
      "LRP2",
      "CUBN",
      "SLC5A2",
      "AQP1",
      "ALDOB"
    )
  ),
  name = "Healthy"
)
```

```{r fig.width=16, fig.height=12}
pb90_PT$DiseaseScore <-
  pb90_PT$Injury1 -
  pb90_PT$Healthy1

f1 <- DimPlot(
  pb90_PT,
  reduction = "umap.TRIAD",
  group.by = "KPMP_celltype",
  label = TRUE,
  repel = TRUE,
  ncol = 2
)

f2 <- FeaturePlot(
  pb90_PT,
  reduction = "umap.TRIAD",
  split.by = "group",
  features = "DiseaseScore",
  keep.scale = "all",
  ncol = 2
)

f1 / f2
```

```{r}
disease_donor <- FetchData(
  pb90_PT,
  vars = c("DiseaseScore", "Injury1", "Healthy1", "group", "record_id")
) %>%
  dplyr::as_tibble() %>%
  dplyr::group_by(record_id, group) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    disease_score = mean(DiseaseScore, na.rm = TRUE),
    injury_score = mean(Injury1, na.rm = TRUE),
    healthy_score = mean(Healthy1, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_cells = dplyr::n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

```{r}
ggplot(
  disease_donor,
  aes(x = group, y = disease_score)
) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, size = 2) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "PT disease score per donor"
  )
```

```{r}
disease_subtype_donor <- FetchData(
  pb90_PT,
  vars = c("DiseaseScore", "Injury1", "Healthy1", "group", "record_id", "KPMP_celltype")
) %>%
  dplyr::as_tibble() %>%
  dplyr::group_by(record_id, group, KPMP_celltype) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    disease_score = mean(DiseaseScore, na.rm = TRUE),
    injury_score = mean(Injury1, na.rm = TRUE),
    healthy_score = mean(Healthy1, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_cells = dplyr::n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

```{r}
ggplot(
  disease_subtype_donor,
  aes(x = group, y = disease_score)
) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, size = 1.8) +
  facet_wrap(~KPMP_celltype) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "PT disease score per donor"
  )
```

```{r}
kruskal.test(disease_score ~ group, data = disease_donor)

pairwise.wilcox.test(
  disease_donor$disease_score,
  disease_donor$group,
  p.adjust.method = "BH"
)
```

```{r}
library(rstatix)

disease_subtype_donor %>%
  group_by(KPMP_celltype) %>%
  kruskal_test(disease_score ~ group)
```

```{r}
disease_subtype_donor %>%
  group_by(KPMP_celltype) %>%
  pairwise_wilcox_test(
    disease_score ~ group,
    p.adjust.method = "BH"
  )
```

```{r}
comp_df <- as_tibble(
  FetchData(
    pb90_PT,
    vars = c(
      "record_id",
      "group",
      "KPMP_celltype"
    )
  )
)

comp_df <- comp_df %>%
  dplyr::count(record_id, group, KPMP_celltype) %>%
  group_by(record_id) %>%
  mutate(prop = n / sum(n))


```

```{r}
ggplot(
  comp_df,
  aes(
    x = group,
    y = prop,
    fill = KPMP_celltype
  )
) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  facet_wrap(~KPMP_celltype) + theme_classic()
```

```{r}
cell_df <- FetchData(
  pb90_PT,
  vars = c(
    "DiseaseScore",
    "group",
    "KPMP_celltype"
  )
)

ggplot(
  cell_df,
  aes(
    x = group,
    y = DiseaseScore,
    fill = KPMP_celltype
  )
) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  facet_wrap(~KPMP_celltype) + theme_classic()
```

#--------- #tal cells #---------

```{r}
p5<- DimPlot(
  pb90_TAL,
  reduction = "umap.TRIAD",
  group.by = "group"
)

p6 <-DimPlot(
  pb90_TAL,
  reduction = "umap.TRIAD",
  group.by = "KPMP_celltype"
)

p7 <- DimPlot(
  pb90_TAL,
  reduction = "umap.TRIAD",
  split.by = "group",
  group.by = "KPMP_celltype",
  ncol = 2
)
```

```{r fig.width=18}
p8 <- FeaturePlot(
  pb90_TAL,
  reduction = "umap.TRIAD",
  features = c(
    "UMOD",
    "SLC12A1",
    "KCNJ1",
    "CLDN16",
    "VCAM1",
    "KRT18"),
  ncol = 2
)

p5 | p8
p7 | p8
```

```{r}
pb90_TAL <- AddModuleScore(
  pb90_TAL,
  features = list(
    c("VCAM1", "KRT8", "UMOD", "CLDN16")
  ),
  name = "TAL_injury"
)
```

```{r}
VlnPlot(
  pb90_TAL,
  features = "TAL_injury1",
  group.by = "group"
)
```

```{r}
p9<- DimPlot(
  pb90_EC_PTC,
  reduction = "umap.TRIAD",
  group.by = "group"
)

p10 <-DimPlot(
  pb90_EC_PTC,
  reduction = "umap.TRIAD",
  group.by = "KPMP_celltype"
)

p11 <- DimPlot(
  pb90_EC_PTC,
  reduction = "umap.TRIAD",
  split.by = "group",
  group.by = "KPMP_celltype",
  ncol = 2
)
p9
p10
p11
```
